name: Tofu Stew with Sweet Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Sweet potatoes, cut into half-inch diamond shapes
1/2 cup Parsnips, cut into 1/2-inch diamond shapes
1/2 cup Yellow squash, sliced 1/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the vegetable stock, sweet potatoes, onions, celery, mushrooms, turnips, parsnips, carrots, ginger, garlic, soy sauce, mirin, and sake.
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 25 minutes.
3. Add zucchini and yellow squash, and continue simmering for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Stir in the tofu and cook for another 5 minutes.
5. Season with salt, pepper, and Szechuan peppercorns to taste.
6. Garnish with chopped green onions and serve.
